author: PC Gamer
text:
Full list of The Sims 4 Enchanted by Nature cheats for editing Fairy Sims or mastering their Apothecary skills
Here's your full reference list for cheats in the fairy expansion with career cheats, skill cheats, and even cheats for fairy rankings.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Steam Controller demand is so high that new reservations won't be fulfilled until 2027
The queue system has been tweaked to give more useful shipping estimations, but they're not encouraging.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Steam Next Fest's top played games include only 1 of over 500 demos with an AI disclosure
Anime, friendslop and relaxed offroading are the highlights, but seriously Valve: give us an AI filter.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The devs of EVE Online's survival spinoff are on a 'side quest' to get it on Steam Deck: 'Our goal is to get this to as many players as possible'
Gamepad support and EVE Frontier's own launcher have been the biggest hurdles so far.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Trump says Apple has agreed to build chips with Intel in the USA
But for now, it's just a post on Truth Social...

author: PC Gamer
text:
Instead of wishlisting its game, the developer of my favorite Next Fest demo wants you to play anyone else's: 'There are some genuinely great creators in this fest who deserve the attention'
It's an unconventional marketing strategy, but I'll allow it.

author: PC Gamer
text:
World of Warcraft players will never have to leave the MMO once Blizzard adds Discord chat for guilds in the next update
Looking for a group is about to be a lot easier in patch 12.1 Curse of Ula'tek.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The director of all six Sharknado movies has a new film, and it's a Dave the Diver live-action short
Mintrocket teamed up with Asylum's Anthony C. Ferrante for some silly jungle carnage.

author: PC Gamer
text:
A small band of Nightdive rebels united to make the System Shock remake after it 'ran out of money' midway through development
Look at you, hackers.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Snapdragon Reality Elite chip aims for 'up to 60% higher GPU performance, up to 30% increase in CPU performance' in VR gaming
A stronger case for smartglasses.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Melgeek Real81 review
A competitive keyboard that stumbles in more casual settings.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Apparently some of the best gaming mice aren't staying at the right DPI when moved slowly
'DPI downshift', they call it.

author: PC Gamer
text:
My quick test of Lumen Lite shows that it's probably good news for ray-traced gaming on handheld PCs, but I suspect that it will be used everywhere because of the pressure developers are now under
With studios being closed down faster than you can blink, every coder is going to be using one-click fixes.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Valve's latest SteamOS is out with 'initial support for upcoming Steam Machine hardware'
And the OLED charging LED works like it should now.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'Many people want to use VPNs for privacy—that is important—but we know that some children use them to get around restrictions': UK government considering VPN ban
'We've tried nothing, and we're all out of ideas.'

author: PC Gamer
text:
SanDisk's latest Optimus gaming SSDs start at $799 MSRP for the 2 TB model and you don't even get Gen 5 speeds for that
There is a Gen 5 model, but it starts at $525 for the 1 TB drive. Bargain!

author: PC Gamer
text:
Dave the Diver: In the Jungle's cutscenes are even hornier than they are in the base game
Strap in.

author: PC Gamer
text:
GTA 6 pre-orders open next week, and to celebrate Rockstar has revealed its official cover art
I honestly didn't think we'd get this far.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Gabe Newell buys $70.8 million mansion in Florida, and naturally it has a dock for his superyachts and a personal tunnel to the ocean
How he does like to be beside the seaside.

author: PC Gamer
text:
We now have teardown pics of the Steam Frame controller and it looks like it could be pretty repairable
It could follow in the Steam Controller's footsteps.

author: PC Gamer
text:
D&D-inspired Critical Role's homegrown videogame is coming along well, says Laura Bailey: 'There's a lot of work being done'
Downtime activity.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Snap unveils AR glasses which CEO describes as 'highly wearable' in clip that visibly shows the chunky frames crushing his ears
I'm told this is definitely not a joke that got out of hand.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Valve upgrades AMD's 9070 XT GPU in the Steam Hardware Survey, finally allowing the credit it deserves
But still only in 23rd place, natch.

author: PC Gamer
text:
'Price increases are unavoidable' says Tim Cook, proving even Apple isn't impervious to the global memory shortage
"We’re willing to use our balance sheet to help be a part of the solution."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Final Fantasy 14 will give players in Japan a dog for paying their taxes
Trade offer: I receive financed infrastructure. You receive: A dog.

author: PC Gamer
text:
PC Gamer magazine's new issue is on sale now: Planet Zoo 2
Plus, Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve, Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, Tides of Annihilation, Frontier Legends, Forza Horizon 6, Return to Castle Wolfenstein, and much more, too

author: PC Gamer
text:
How to get the fishing rod in Dave the Diver: In the Jungle
After years of catching fish, Dave can finally do some proper fishing.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Dave the Diver: In the Jungle review
Like Bancho's cooking, Dave's new adventure is delicious.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Xbox's latest tactics display 'a basic misunderstanding of how the interactive entertainment world moves', says former PlayStation exec
The console war also unfolds on LinkedIn.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Do you recognize these survival crafting games? Prove you're a real master of roughin' it with our latest quiz on base-building sandboxes
Are you the building friend or the guy who can't stop fishing?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Guild Wars 3 is 'significantly more' of an MMO than the first game, but that doesn't mean it's like GW2: 'All three of our games can coexist as different experiences'
GW3 is definitively an MMO, but ArenaNet says it won't play like either of its predecessors.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Path of Exile 2 director says players exploiting system to become in-game millionaires 'ruined Christmas for me' and joked that he's 'lost all sympathy' for everyone who took advantage of it
And then he found out they were doing it again in the middle of the interview.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Nobody needs to grind for 100 hours to see how Path of Exile 2 has redefined the action RPG loot hunt
Grinding Gear Games has filled the world with delicious mysteries to keep you going after the campaign.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Bobby Prince, the legendary composer behind Doom and Wolfenstein 3D, has died
Prince helped define the sound which characterized the early FPS, as well as classic PC games like Catacomb 3-D.

author: PC Gamer
text:
If you like puzzle platformers, multi-dimensional traversal, and ducks—I have the game for you
Sometimes all it takes is a cool hat to get a new perspective on things.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Sony deletes mention of PC from annual strategy report in favour of a gushing about AI
Seems like a downgrade.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The greatest FPS mode of all time is endangered
It never got better than capture the flag.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Epic says the 'ground-up rebuild' of its launcher offers 5-6.5x improved performance, and the Epic Games Store is getting a big redesign
Slides out of Unreal Fest promise "5x faster cold start (average)" and "6.5x faster systray restore to library (average)" as Epic works on making its store suck less.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Don't be put off by its name—Rizz Dungeon: Skeleton Key to My Heart is actually a very fun dungeon crawler with a unique spin
The Nightclub Bathroom: Dungeon Crawler Edition

author: PC Gamer
text:
'London is ready to level up and lead the world in esports': Mayor of London wants to use big events to stimulate economy and create opportunities for young people
Insert tuppence to play.

author: PC Gamer
text:
MrBeast is co-writing 'the book event of the year' to 'get a whole generation psyched about reading again'
That's probably what will happen.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Palworld studio says 'gamers don't want' AI in their games: 'It feels like everyone who is super gung-ho about it isn't from the industry'
It's not the first time Pocketpair's John Buckley has spoken out against the tech.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Logitech G305 X Superlight review
A solid and fairly plain upgrade on the original, but not wholly better either.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The US is worried China could have a top-spec chipmaking machine despite export restrictions, but the machine maker ASML denies it
All I know is you can't hide a 150+ ton EUV machine in MY house.

author: PC Gamer
text:
WoW's quest to add variable difficulty to just about everything continues in Midnight patch 12.1's Mythic world bosses, though there's a catch
Straight lair lurkin'.

author: PC Gamer
text:
This 1986 Japanese adventure game showing up on Steam in 2026 guarantees it makes my GOTY list—you've really got to play it
Relics doesn't belong in a museum: it belongs on your PC.

author: PC Gamer
text:
AMD is said to be holding talks with Samsung about making some of its future chips to offset TSMC's constrained supply of cutting-edge wafers
If true, my money would be on low-end laptop APUs or Ryzen IO chiplets.

author: PC Gamer
text:
The best cosy cleaning sim I've played has just gone into playtest—if you like PowerWash Simulator, then this is the next game for you
Just lock me in an attic and give me some trinkets.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Players have uncovered a mistake with GTA 6's cover art and we've got a re-run of the same old jokes: 'pre-order cancelled'
Could the teeth be telling us something?

author: PC Gamer
text:
Slay the Spire 2 patch fixes RNG bug after a fan's '8 hour descent into madness' proves it exists—alongside heaps of other updates and a new Act 3 boss
"Rest assured that your suffering is now truly random!"

text:

Here's your full reference list for cheats in the fairy expansion with career cheats, skill cheats, and even cheats for fairy rankings.
